chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

text: 1568 - وقال الصادق عليه السلام: " إذا صليت معهم غفر لك بعدد من خالفك.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1568 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If you pray with them (in congregation), you will be forgiven according to the number of those who oppose you."
